original: Worried that your employees may stop providing you with their delicious milk? Brightwater LLC has you covered! Our Lactomax line of piercings ensure their production will be as abundant as the first day on the job! Must be worn on the nipples for them to have any effect. Passively induces lactation. Negates lactation loss. Changes lactation type to milk.
